Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Relates to unlawful discriminatory practices against tenants relating to citizenship or immigration status
Summary: Prohibits landlords or their agents from inquiring or requiring disclosure about citizenship or immigration status, requiring specific immigration documentation to be presented, disclosing immigration or citizenship status to third parties, or threatening to report a tenant's citizenship or immigration status in retaliation for asserting their rights.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to unlawful discriminatory practices against tenants relating to citizenship or immigration status
